description: NVIDIA shfl_scan sample. main()/shuffle_simple_test()/shuffle_integral_image_test() depend on unvendored helper_cuda.h, helper_functions.h and shfl_integral_image.cuh and are intentionally NOT ported (see port_mode). Only the two __global__ kernels (shfl_scan_test, uniform_add) are ported and verified via a synthesized harness that invokes shfl_scan_test directly.
